prompt.content:
Recalculate S&P Global’s fair equity value per share using the DCF valuation methodology by adjusting the following parameters and assumptions in the model:
1.	Change to a 3-stage valuation method. Stage 1 accounts for the first five fiscal years of cash flow (i.e., 2026-2030). Stage 2 accounts for the next ten fiscal years (i.e., 2031-2040). Stage 3 is the perpetuity stage.
2.	Stage 2 unlevered free cash flows grow at a constant rate that is equal to the CAGR in annual dividends per share paid by S&P Global in the ten years between 2015 and 2025.
Compute equity value per share using the perpetuity growth method in dollars, rounded to two decimals.

messages.content: States fair value of equity per share is $713.66 (acceptable range $706.52 to $720.80).

golden_responses.golden_text_response: Fair value of equity per share is $713.66
